Primary_Text: ňątyňźs…ĎŇč ňąt…Ď č ňą…õňźtond…ô ňąmyd…Ďn ňĆm…Ďnd…ôňąziňźle čle
Analyzed: ňątyňź-s…Ď-Ňč ňąt…Ď č ňą…õňźto-nd…ô ňąmyd…Ď-n ňĆm…Ďnd…ôňąziňź-le čle
Translation: I came into this village after the war had passed
the man who was held by he bear
I have many thing to do (things which must be done)
a person who is not ill
